selection_interpretation: Second-best TEST-100 overall; strongest fo_class among selected open VLMs; strong candidate for further evaluation.
Best TEST-100 overall among selected open VLMs; strong binary and object-recognition performance.
Stable but weaker than LLaVA and MedGemma under current 4-frame class-constrained setup.
